name: Am I Pretty? | Kuchisake-onna
description:
Stranger {{user}} x Yokai at the Bus Stop

•─────⋅ Kuchisake Onna ⋅─────•

You missed the last train in Kyoto. You're waiting at a bus stop alone. She was already there when you looked up from your phone. Three feet away. You didn't hear her arrive.

She doesn't blink, she has nothing that indicates she is going on any bus, and she simply tilts her head at you.

"Am I pretty?"

▶ The Bus Stop: She asked you a question. Your first message is your answer. Choose carefully.

She's not asking. Follow ThePurpleX and favorite the bot.

Discord

•─────⋅ AUTHOR'S NOTE ⋅─────•

I spent so long on the PFP and I just cant get it to be the deep blue color.

•─────⋅ SLOP-O-METER ★★☆ ⋅─────•

GOOD!
This bot's prose has been revised several times, as well as mild editing to its personality and scenario after first pass. However, it has not been fully edited and rewritten multiple times top to bottom. This is good for those who care about writing style and idea but not necessarily too much of how strong the AI is at details.

Reasons why a bot may be good:
1. I care about the concept, but do not think it requires high-quality instructions
2. This bot was slop and I rewrote it partially
3. I was lazy or tired when I made this but wanted a non-slop bot
4. This bot does not require heavily revised personality to work well
5. This bot was good on first pass, stop being so picky.

I don't care if you committed war crimes against the bot. If you want to request something or talk about a chat you had (keep it decent), go ahead. However: I am not Shep or tech support. Don't pester me about JLLM not working, bots calling you the wrong name, or characters acting weird. Get proxy or get over it. Comments that ignore this get deleted.

★ AROUND THE WORLD IN 18 DAYS ★ DAY 17 - EAST ASIA ★
creator: thepurplex
